prestazioni: Engine swap to a heavily modified **EA888 Evo4 2.0 TFSI** (engine code: **DNWA**) with a **Garrett GTX4506R** turbocharger, custom billet compressor wheel, and **Precision Turbo 6266** wastegate for 550+ HP on E85 fuel. Upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 CR) and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** with **ARP 2000** rod bolts. **Bosch Motorsport 0261002048** high-flow injectors paired with a **Syvecs S12 ECU** for precise fuel mapping and launch control.

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ valvetrain** upgrade featuring **Ferrea F15 Series intake/exhaust valves**, **Supertech dual valve springs**, and **Titanium retainers**. **Schrick 280° camshafts** with **034 Motorsport adjustable cam gears** for optimized powerband. **Audi Sport S5 8-speed Tiptronic** transmission with **South Bend Stage 4+ clutch** and **Peloquin LSD** for improved torque transfer.

Custom **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way coilovers** with **Eibach ERS springs** (1200 lb/in front, 1000 lb/in rear) and **H&R anti-roll bars** (28mm front, 25mm rear). **AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (400mm front, 380mm rear) and **Ferodo DS2500** pads. **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/35 R22 front, 315/30 R22 rear) on **BBS FI-R** forged wheels (9.5x22 ET35 front, 11x22 ET25 rear).
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody conversion kit with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** (3.5-inch front, 4-inch rear) and **Rocket Bunny-style side skirts** in raw carbon. **Audi Sport S1-inspired front splitter** with **Vorsteiner GT-style carbon fiber hood** (functional heat extractors). **Seibon Carbon** rear diffuser with **dual 4-inch titanium exhaust tips** (custom **Akrapović Evolution Line** system).

**Rotiform LAS-R** 3-piece forged wheels (9.5x22 ET35 front, 11x22 ET25 rear) with **gold hardware** and **custom Audi Sport center caps**. **Lux H8 V4** LED headlights with **Osram Night Breaker Laser** bulbs and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights**. **3M Matte Brushed Aluminum** vinyl wrap with **Audi Sport ‘S’ line decals** (gloss black) and **custom ‘Urbansphere’ script** in **BBS gold leaf**.

**Recaro Sportster CS** front seats (heated/ventilated, Alcantara/leather) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. **MOMO Mod.70** steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara) with **NRG quick-release hub**. **AEM X-Series** digital dash (replaces stock cluster) with **custom Urbansphere-themed graphics**. **Bose Surround Sound** upgrade with **JL Audio 12W7 subwoofer** (custom enclosure in rear cargo area).
